title: Atmospheric Nether; Structures Add-On
description: An add-on to TBM's Atmospheric Nether that aims to expand on the story of the Nether and those who once inhabited it.
body:
Atmospheric Nether Structures works in tandem with Atmospheric Nether to invite players to weave stories of the Nether's history. The structures in this datapack are found underground in an Atmospheric Nether world across two cave biomes.

These structures are designed to entice the player for adventure and treasure-seeking, as well as to fascinate the historian in them. The structures are not easy to find, and will take plenty of exploration, but hopefully you will find the rewards worth it.
